dc:title: Touring bicycle beside a rural guardrail
dc:description: A loaded touring bicycle is parked in the foreground against a roadside metal guardrail, with a rusted rail above it. The bicycle carries multiple travel items, including rear panniers, a rolled sleeping mat or foam pad on the front, water bottles, and strapped gear across the rear rack. Beyond the road barrier stretches a dry, golden agricultural landscape of harvested fields, low hills, scrubby vegetation, and pale exposed earth mounds. The sky is clear blue with light wisps of cloud, suggesting a warm, arid rural setting.
